name: Reunion Neuroscience Inc. Common Shares
summary: Reunion Neuroscience Inc., formerly known as Field Trip Health Ltd., is a biotechnology company focused on developing psychedelic-based therapies for mental health conditions. The company is researching and developing novel compounds and treatment protocols to address unmet needs in areas such as depression and anxiety. Reunion Neuroscience is committed to advancing the field of psychedelic medicine through research and innovation.
